issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: Text("${String.format("%.2f", remaining)} €", fontWeight = FontWeight.ExtraBold, color = if (remaining < 10) Color.Red else Color(0xFF00C853))

issue.message: This view is not constrained. It only has designtime positions, so it will jump to (0,0) at runtime unless you add the constraints

The drawable "kefta_marocaine_epicee_5613" in drawable-1024x683 has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Call to `CredentialManager.getCredential` without use of `NoCredentialException`
issue.errorLine1: val result = credentialManager.getCredential(context = activity, request = request)

issue.message: Replace the <fragment> tag with FragmentContainerView.
Redundant label can be removed
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more

This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage.class)`
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This folder configuration (`v23`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `values`.
